caption: A woman with blonde-tipped curly hair tied up is recorded in a studio setting, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white graphic on the front. She is positioned in profile, facing left and smiling. In front of her is a professional studio microphone. Behind her is a white wall accented with a vertical yellow stripe and a black surface. A screen in the background displays the word "Johnson" in red text above a white graphic, with "Employees Only" written in smaller white text in the upper right corner. On-screen graphics include a logo with "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white text, accompanied by a smaller "PODCAST" logo. Across the frames, the woman remains in a similar position, maintaining her smile and gaze toward the left, with very little movement in the scene.
